title: PEACE PARK - Updated June 2026 - 11 Photos & 10 Reviews - Yelp
content: Lovely, small park, nestled in and around the remnants of campus living. The statue of Sadako is a gorgeous tribute, easily worth the visit.

title: Sadako and the Thousand Cranes Statue in Peace Park in the ...
content: Many of the park visitors leave paper cranes around the sculpture. Fratelli's Ice Cream gifted the statue to the city and commissioned Daryl Smith to sculpt it.

title: Sadako and the Thousand Paper Cranes in Seattle, WA
